title: LLM eval scenario
description: Schema for one scenario file under scenarios/. Mirrors the RCS eval-protocol per docs/eval-protocol.md.

scenario_id.description: Two-digit prefix + kebab-case slug. Matches the filename stem.

scenario_kind.description: Coverage class. Most harnesses use the first three.

query.description: Verbatim user input the candidate model receives.

files.description: Optional list of file paths the candidate should reference, relative to the scenario dir.

expected_behavior.description: Exactly 3 rubric items, each a third-person assertion about the response.

tags.description: Optional categorical tags for slicing results (e.g., 'pii', 'multi-turn', 'tool-use').
